src: A plush lobster toy with soft orange fabric, two black eyes, large pincers, and segmented body with pale stripes. It has a small white tuft representing its mouth and a soft tail, embodying a simple but cute design.
edit: A charming lobster toy featuring pastel blue fabric with subtle white stripes. It has glittery black eyes, shimmering blue pincers, and a plush tail. The mouth comprises tiny, pale-blue fabric tufts, creating a whimsical feel.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object lies sideways on blue metal slats of a bench with a brick wall, metal railings, and trees in the background, casting long shadows from the sun above.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is wedged upright between tree branches surrounded by rough bark and patches of grass in a backyard with a brick building visible.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is nestled within the metallic structure of a bike rack, lying on a concrete floor against a white wall, partially shaded.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object reclines on a sunlit wooden bench, surrounded by lush green grass and a building with a pale brick facade in the distant background.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object stands vertically against a desk cluttered with items like a colorful cup, keyboard, small box, under soft indoor lighting by a white brick wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object is sprawled atop a metal surface next to vibrant green foliage and bushy vegetation, with sunlight creating dappled patterns.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object rests on vibrant green grass under bright sunlight, surrounded by well-maintained lawn and shadows elongating across the field.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object lies sideways on frosty blue metal slats of a bench with a snow-covered brick wall, icy railings, and snow-dusted trees nearby, under a pale winter sky.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object is wedged upright between snow-frosted tree branches surrounded by icy bark and snowy patches of grass in a wintry backyard near a brick building.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is nestled within the icy structure of a bike rack, lying on a snow-dusted concrete floor against a white wall, with shades of winter.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object reclines on a snow-dusted wooden bench, surrounded by frosty grass and a building with a pale, ice-coated brick facade in the distant background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object stands vertically against a desk scattered with wintry-themed items like a snowflake-patterned cup, keyboard, small snow-covered box, under soft indoor lighting by a white brick wall.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The object is sprawled atop an icy metal surface next to bare, frost-covered foliage and bushes, with winter sunlight creating crisp patterns.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The object rests on snow-blanketed grass under bright winter sunlight, surrounded by well-maintained snow-draped lawn and shadows softening the snowy field.
